title: ilysanthes minima
intro: Ilysanthes minima, also known as the small Ilysanthes or small button flower, is a plant species in the family Menyanthaceae. This plant is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Ilysanthes minima are used in herbal preparations, and they are known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. The herbal preparations of Ilysanthes minima, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
